summary: A Go-based testing and migration tool that translates Goss configurations, runs assertions, and detects project structures with an upcoming dashboard and plugin ecosystem.
concerns: Staged but uncommitted changes could lead to drift
Heavy reliance on test files for insights suggests possible lack of inline documentation
Upgrading to CCS v0.19.0 standards might introduce hidden breaking changes
Monorepo internal package could become a bottleneck if not well-modularized
suggestions: Commit the staged changes to maintain a clean working tree
Add godoc comments to core packages like runner and translator
Validate all Kubernetes examples against the new CCS v0.19.0 standards
Review the brainstorm docs to prioritize the upcoming MCP extension and dashboard work
